title: imagebuildah.getImageTypeAndHistoryAndDiffIDs: cache results
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Cache the information we look up about images when evaluating them as potential build cache matches, in an effort to reduce the number of NewImage() calls we make, because they can be expensive.

#### How to verify it

This should not impact tests.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```
